source_jobs.title: Marketing Executive
source_jobs.description:
OP Labs builds Optimism, an open-source blockchain network that powers the next generation of financial infrastructure. Hundreds of companies, from the world's largest enterprises like Sony, Coinbase, Kraken, Uniswap, OKX, and Bitpanda to the most ambitious early-stage builders, use the OP stack to launch their own blockchains and bring their users onchain. Today, over 65% of Layer 2 activity on Ethereum runs through the OP stack.

We are a small team building at the speed of the ecosystem we support. We’re remote-friendly but the NYC office is our center of gravity. We've raised $178M from a16z, Paradigm, and others. We have our work cut out for us and are looking for exceptional people to join us.


Role and Responsibilities

The OP Stack powers 13% of all crypto transactions today. We are building a one-stop shop for enterprises onboarding into crypto, with the most performant and most battle-tested chain infrastructure available on the market today. We’re looking for a marketing leader to help expand into new segments, deepen engagement with our existing audiences, and shape the public narrative to reflect the incredible momentum existing within the company.

In this critical leadership role, you will report directly to the CBO and forge key strategic partnerships with Growth, Product and Data teams while building a world class marketing function, the best in this space.



What are the role responsibilities?

You’ll be joining at a pivotal moment for Optimism & OP Labs. You’ll build and lead a lean marketing function from the ground up, responsible for execution across:

 - Brand Marketing – Strengthen awareness and positioning of the OP Stack and vision.

 - Product Marketing – Translate technical capabilities into compelling, differentiated narratives.

 - Developer Marketing – Engage the builder community through content, partnerships, and education.

 - Enterprise Marketing – Craft GTM playbooks and demand generation for institutional adoption.

 - Event Marketing – Amplify brand presence across industry conferences and owned events.

We have a sprawling set of audiences across a wide array of industries. You will own a consistent brand voice, and regular communication targeted towards:

 - Prospective and existing customers

 - Channel partners and integration collaborators

 - Tinkerers and application builders

 - Potential employees and external contributors

 - Token holders and investors



What skills do you bring?

 - Proven experience leading marketing teams at the executive level, ideally within web3 organizations.

 - Ability to define and execute multi-channel strategies spanning brand, product, developer, and enterprise marketing.

 - Demonstrated success strengthening brand awareness and shaping public narratives for innovative or technical products.

 - Ability to translate complex technical concepts into compelling, accessible narratives.

 - Strong interpersonal and communication skills to rally internal and external stakeholders around a shared vision.

 - A love for crypto — you understand and care about the user and developer journey and have an innate sense for how the space moves.



What will you like about us?

 - We take care of our employees. Competitive compensation, fully paid medical, dental, and vision, and a 4% 401K match—learn more about our benefits, culture, and all recruiting FAQ here. https://www.notion.so/OP-Labs-Hiring-FAQ-79f82dd0763e4344b99e9ce3ea1728da?pvs=21

 - We take pride in the accomplishments of our teammates and support each other in doing the best work of our careers.

 - Our team is a diverse group of people from varied backgrounds. We cherish our eclecticism and consider it a great strength.

 - We're remote-friendly with an NYC office where we like to collaborate in person.

 - We think long-term. Our founders have been scaling Ethereum since 2015.



We are aware of fraudulent individuals falsely claiming to represent OP Labs in recruitment activities.
Please note:

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant & Office Manager
source_jobs.description:
OP Labs builds Optimism, an open-source blockchain network that powers the next generation of financial infrastructure. Hundreds of companies, from the world's largest enterprises like Sony, Coinbase, Kraken, Uniswap, OKX, and Bitpanda to the most ambitious early-stage builders, use the OP stack to launch their own blockchains and bring their users onchain. Today, over 65% of Layer 2 activity on Ethereum runs through the OP stack.

We are a small team building at the speed of the ecosystem we support. We’re remote-friendly but the NYC office is our center of gravity. We've raised $178M from a16z, Paradigm, and others. We have our work cut out for us and are looking for exceptional people to join us.


ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

The EA & Office Manager will be a trusted partner to OP Labs senior leadership — keeping three executives organized while owning the day-to-day health of our NYC HQ. While these two mandates are distinct, both are critical to how OP Labs operates, and you are the primary owner of both.


WHAT ARE THE ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES?

Provide executive support for the CEO, Chief Growth Officer, and VP of Engineering

 - Manage complex calendars, travel logistics, and meeting preparation across three senior leaders

 - Serve as a reliable point of contact between executives and stakeholders, handling communications with professionalism and discretion

 - Coordinate and prepare materials for executive meetings, board preparation, and company offsites

 - Support leadership offsites: coordination, materials, note-taking, and action item follow-up

 - Establish new—and improve existing—administrative systems and processes

 - Make recommendations with regard to time management, prioritization, delegation, and organization.

 - Assist with ad hoc projects, events and travel arrangements as needed.

 - Must be willing and able to travel internationally



Own day-to-day NYC office operations

 - Partner with Finance and People Ops on expense reporting and budget tracking for office costs

 - Build and manage relationships with building management, service providers, and office vendors

 - Anticipate operational needs and proactively solve problems before they surface

 - Coordinate desk setup, badge access, and first-day logistics for new NYC employees

 - Plan and execute in-office events and team gatherings at NYC HQ


WHAT SKILLS DO YOU BRING?

 - 5+ years as an executive assistant, ideally in a fast-paced startup or tech environment

 - Experience managing office operations, vendor relationships, or facilities

 - Exceptional organizational skills, impeccable attention to detail and strong written and verbal communication; able to represent executives professionally

 - High EQ and discretion when handling sensitive information

 - Proactive problem-solver who anticipates needs before they become issues

 - Comfortable in ambiguity and able to context-switch rapidly

 - Proficiency with Google Workspace, Slack, and common project and calendar tools

 - Embraces AI tools as part of day-to-day work — using them to draft correspondence, prep materials, and handle research faster, with a curiosity for finding new ways to save time

 - Experience booking international travel and managing multi-timezone scheduling



We are aware of fraudulent individuals falsely claiming to represent OP Labs in recruitment activities.
Please note:

 - All official communication will come from an @oplabs.co http://oplabs.co email address, or from a verified Linked profile.

 - We will never ask for payment, banking information, or personal identification details at any stage of our hiring process.

 - All current openings are listed exclusively on our official careers page https://www.optimism.io/careers and linked from our verified social profiles.

 - If you’re ever unsure about a communication that claims to be from OP Labs, please contact us directly at people@oplabs.co to verify authenticity.

Your safety and trust are very importan

source_jobs.title: Sr. Product Manager, Fintechs & Exchanges
source_jobs.description:
OP Labs builds Optimism, an open-source blockchain network that powers the next generation of financial infrastructure. Hundreds of companies, from the world's largest enterprises like Sony, Coinbase, Kraken, Uniswap, OKX, and Bitpanda to the most ambitious early-stage builders, use the OP stack to launch their own blockchains and bring their users onchain. Today, over 65% of Layer 2 activity on Ethereum runs through the OP stack.

We are a small team building at the speed of the ecosystem we support. We’re remote-friendly but the NYC office is our center of gravity. We've raised $178M from a16z, Paradigm, and others. We have our work cut out for us and are looking for exceptional people to join us.



Role and Responsibilities

We’re hiring a Senior Product Manager to drive onchain adoption by fintechs and centralized crypto exchanges in the Optimism ecosystem.

Fintechs and crypto exchanges are rapidly moving their business onchain to serve as the most important distribution partners for bringing millions of users and billions in assets onchain. In this role, you’ll define the roadmap for enterprise-facing products that help these businesses expand their product suite and integrate DeFi functionality without sacrificing user experience.

As the creators of Optimism Mainnet and the infrastructure that powers all OP Stack chains, OP Labs is dedicated to enhancing Ethereum’s performance exponentially. We operate as a Public Benefit Corporation, aligning our mission with the greater public good by funding Ethereum public goods through our growth.



What are the role responsibilities?

 - Lead the Fintech & Exchange Roadmap: Define and execute product strategy across integrations, SDKs, and infrastructure that help fintechs and exchanges embed onchain services into their platforms.

 - Champion the Customer: Build deep expertise in fintechs and exchanges, understanding their needs around compliance, custody, and user experience. Translate those needs into products and partnerships that deliver measurable value.

 - Drive Adoption of Onchain Services: Launch and scale products that make it easier for enterprises to offer yield, trading, payments, and other onchain financial products to their users.

 - Partner with the Ecosystem: Collaborate and coordinate with DeFi protocols, infra providers, custodians, and chain operators to accelerate ecosystem growth.

 - Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Work with engineering, BD, design, and marketing to bring new products from concept to launch and iterate quickly.



What skills do you bring?

 - Experience: 5+ years of product management experience, ideally in fintech, consumer finance apps, or centralized crypto exchanges. Direct experience with onchain/DeFi products is a strong plus.

 - Customer-Driven: Strong ability to engage with enterprise partners, uncover pain points, and translate them into actionable product requirements.

 - Technical Aptitude: Comfortable working across custody, wallet infra, and protocol integrations to inform product decisions.

 - Domain Knowledge: Solid understanding of fintech product mechanics (e.g., trading, lending, payments) or exchange infrastructure.

 - Collaborative & Adaptable: Thrives in fast-moving environments with shifting priorities and rapidly developing regulatory landscape

 - Strong Communicator: Excellent written and verbal skills; able to articulate complex concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.

 - Mission-Aligned: Belief that blockchains can make financial services more open, efficient, and accessible to anyone.



What will you like about us?

 - We take care of our employees. Competitive compensation, fully paid medical, dental, and vision, and a 4% 401K match.

 - We take pride in the accomplishments of our teammates and support each other in doing the best work of our careers.

 - Our team is a diverse group of people from varied backgrounds. We cherish our eclecticism and consider it a great strength.

 - We're

source_jobs.title: Partnerships Lead, Defi
source_jobs.description:
OP Labs builds Optimism, an open-source blockchain network that powers the next generation of financial infrastructure. Hundreds of companies, from the world's largest enterprises like Sony, Coinbase, Kraken, Uniswap, OKX, and Bitpanda to the most ambitious early-stage builders, use the OP stack to launch their own blockchains and bring their users onchain. Today, over 65% of Layer 2 activity on Ethereum runs through the OP stack.

We are a small team building at the speed of the ecosystem we support. We’re remote-friendly but the NYC office is our center of gravity. We've raised $178M from a16z, Paradigm, and others. We have our work cut out for us and are looking for exceptional people to join us.



Role and Responsibilities

This role is focused on accelerating Total Value Locked (TVL) growth across OP Stack chains. You will achieve this by setting the overall DeFi strategy for the OP Stack and managing key relationships with top-tier protocols, including asset issuers, decentralized exchanges, and liquidity providers. A core component of the role is structuring and executing high-ROI, multi-party initiatives, as well as sharing knowledge and best practices with our chain partners.



What are the role responsibilities?

 - Own relationships with top-tier DeFi protocol teams, serving as the primary point of contact, running quarterly business reviews, proactively removing blockers, and ensuring those DiFi partnerships can deliver on joint OP and partner objectives.

 - Contribute to OP Mainnet and the OP Stack DeFi strategy and execution, by owning the asset pipeline, and working with partners to create new markets, vaults, and sustainable DeFi yield strategies.

 - Design and deploy milestone-based incentive programs, track grant ROI, and work with internal partners (Growth, Data, Product) to optimize incentive strategies to drive towards sustainable business outcomes.

 - Lead strategic initiatives and thought leadership for the OP Stack DeFi ecosystem (e.g., create and deploy playbooks for TVL growth across OP Stack chain partners), build narrative and content to showcase the ecosystem’s growth and wins, represent Optimism at industry events, and surface emerging trends and opportunities.

What success looks like: 3+ OP Stack chains with a $1B TVL in the next 12 months



What skills do you bring?

 - 4–7 years in DeFi partnerships / protocol ops experience

 - Deep understanding of the EVM DeFi ecosystem including DeFi protocol mechanics and onchain behaviors of various user archetypes from yield-seekers, liquidity providers, farmers/degens, to institutions.

 - Demonstrated experience with tokenomics and incentive programs, with sharp business intuition to choose incentive campaigns that drive durable outcomes.

 - Hands-on product/technical fluency, obsessed with understanding how DeFi protocols, apps, and the infrastructure required for successful DeFi ecosystem

 - Strong cross-functional execution and negotiation skills.

 - Excellent written/verbal communication — exec-level presence.



What will you like about us?

 - We take care of our employees. Competitive compensation, fully paid medical, dental, and vision, and a 4% 401K match.

 - We take pride in the accomplishments of our teammates and support each other in doing the best work of our careers.

 - Our team is a diverse group of people from varied backgrounds. We cherish our eclecticism and consider it a great strength.

 - We're remote-friendly with an NYC office where we like to collaborate in person.

 - We think long-term. Our founders have been scaling Ethereum since 2015.

 - Learn more about our interviewing here! https://oplabs.notion.site/Interviewing-at-OP-26cf153ee1628080ab4fd1ddca5b5998

source_jobs.title: Solutions Engineer, Japan
source_jobs.description:
OP Labs builds Optimism, an open-source blockchain network that powers the next generation of financial infrastructure. Hundreds of companies, from the world's largest enterprises like Sony, Coinbase, Kraken, Uniswap, OKX, and Bitpanda to the most ambitious early-stage builders, use the OP stack to launch their own blockchains and bring their users onchain. Today, over 65% of Layer 2 activity on Ethereum runs through the OP stack.

We are a small team building at the speed of the ecosystem we support. We’re remote-friendly but the NYC office is our center of gravity. We've raised $178M from a16z, Paradigm, and others. We have our work cut out for us and are looking for exceptional people to join us.



Role and Responsibilities

We are looking for a Japan-based Sales Engineer to support Optimism’s enterprise and institutional adoption across the Japanese market. This role sits at the intersection of sales, product, and engineering, and is critical to helping large institutions evaluate, design, and deploy production-grade on-chain systems using the OP Stack.

You will partner closely with the Sales, Product and Engineering teams to leverage Optimism’s technology into institution-ready solutions; supporting technical diligence, performance testing, architecture design, and integration planning for Japan’s largest and most innovative enterprises. **This role must be based in Japan.**



What are the role responsibilities?

 - Support deal execution & technical validation
   
   - Act as the primary technical counterpart for enterprise and institutional partners during evaluations, pilots, and integrations into production systems
   
   - Lead technical discovery sessions covering architecture, performance, security, compliance, and operational requirements
   
   - Design and support test environments (e.g., devnets, performance benchmarks, cloud deployments, etc) to validate throughput, latency, and cost assumptions
   
   - Respond to detailed technical diligence from banks, asset managers, system integrators, and regulators

 - Bridge product, engineering, and customers
   
   - Translate enterprise requirements into clear technical feedback for OP Labs product and engineering teams
   
   - Help shape roadmap priorities related to institutional needs (e.g., performance, compliance tooling, privacy, sequencing models)
   
   - Support integrations with wallets, custody providers, cloud infrastructure, and system integrators (e.g., Fireblocks, AWS, SIs)

 - Enable partners for production readiness
   
   - Guide partners through OP Stack architecture, deployment models, upgrade paths, and operational best practices
   
   - Support documentation localization and technical enablement in Japanese
   
   - Help customers compare and migrate from private / permissioned experimentation to public or hybrid production deployments

 - Represent Optimism technically in Japan
   
   - Participate in technical workshops, partner meetings, and industry events alongside sales and Business Development
   
   - Serve as a trusted technical advisor to Japanese enterprises evaluating Layer 2 and blockchain infrastructure
   
   - Collaborate with local ecosystem partners (SIs, exchanges, wallets) to accelerate adoption
     

What skills do you bring?

 - Experience
   
   - 5–10 years of experience as a Sales Engineer, Solutions Architect, or Technical Pre-Sales role
   
   - Background in blockchain infrastructure, cloud platforms, distributed systems, or financial infrastructure
   
   - Hands-on experience with Ethereum or EVM-based systems (Layer 1 or Layer 2 strongly preferred)
   
   - Experience working with regulated institutions (banks, asset managers, exchanges, payments firms) is a strong plus

 - Technical Skills
   
   - Strong understanding of blockchain architecture: sequencing, finality, rollups, smart contracts, and network operations
   
   - Familiarity with cloud infrastructure and production deployment environments

source_jobs.title: Partnerships Lead, Blockchain Infrastructure
source_jobs.description:
OP Labs builds Optimism, an open-source blockchain network that powers the next generation of financial infrastructure. Hundreds of companies, from the world's largest enterprises like Sony, Coinbase, Kraken, Uniswap, OKX, and Bitpanda to the most ambitious early-stage builders, use the OP stack to launch their own blockchains and bring their users onchain. Today, over 65% of Layer 2 activity on Ethereum runs through the OP stack.

We are a small team building at the speed of the ecosystem we support. We’re remote-friendly but the NYC office is our center of gravity. We've raised $178M from a16z, Paradigm, and others. We have our work cut out for us and are looking for exceptional people to join us.



Role and Responsibilities

Infrastructure partnership development is vital for the OP Stack. This role, the Partnerships Lead, Blockchain Infrastructure is about owning the entire lifecycle of critical partnerships for the OP Stack ecosystem. You will find opportunities, close deals, and manage relationships with key blockchain infrastructure providers. This requires a unique mix of commercial, strategic, and technical expertise to navigate the complex crypto landscape.



What are the role responsibilities?

 - Own the end-to-end lifecycle (sourcing, deal negotiation, integration, and partner management) for critical ecosystem infrastructure partnerships, including:
   
   - On/off ramps and payments.
   
   - Compliance, insurance, and risk infrastructure.
   
   - Market makers, liquidity infrastructure, and selected CEX relationships.
   
   - Stablecoin and fiat-rail related partnerships.

 - Collaborate with the Product team to define and launch new products that leverage third-party capabilities/technology, specifically in areas like Privacy and CGT.

 - Create and own the strategic roadmap for this section of the infrastructure partner ecosystem.

 - Proactively communicate key ecosystem developments, potential partnership blockers, and strategic updates to executive leadership.



What skills do you bring?

 - Partnership & Business Acumen:
   
   - Deep experience managing and scaling strategic partnerships in the crypto infrastructure space, with a track record of owning complex categories end-to-end.
   
   - Strong commercial skills in deal structuring and negotiation for multi-party or multi-chain deals, balancing partner economics with ecosystem objectives.
   
   - Systems-level reasoning, including an understanding of network effects, liquidity loops, and value exchange within the ecosystem.

 - Product & Technical Fluency:
   
   - Domain technical fluency (infra or DeFi), comfortable engaging with protocol and infra engineers.
   
   - Strategic product thinking (build-partner-buy decisions) and the ability to run product discovery with partners.

 - Execution & Communication:
   
   - High-agency cross-functional operator, proficient at driving work across internal teams and external partners to ship integrations and create measurable impact.
   
   - Clear written and verbal communicator, able to write concise strategy documents and integration plans to keep all stakeholders aligned.
   
   - Proven ability to manage multi-quarter partnership roadmaps and drive clarity in ambiguous environments.
   
   - A genuine passion for blockchain technology, decentralization, and the future of open systems.



What will you like about us?

 - We take care of our employees. Competitive compensation, fully paid medical, dental, and vision, and a 4% 401K match.

 - We take pride in the accomplishments of our teammates and support each other in doing the best work of our careers.

 - Our team is a diverse group of people from varied backgrounds. We cherish our eclecticism and consider it a great strength.

 - We're remote-friendly with an NYC office where we like to collaborate in person.

 - We think long-term. Our founders have been scaling Ethereum since 2015.

 - Learn more about our interviewing here! https://oplabs.

source_jobs.title: AI Lead Engineer
source_jobs.description:
OP Labs builds Optimism, an open-source blockchain network that powers the next generation of financial infrastructure. Hundreds of companies, from the world's largest enterprises like Sony, Coinbase, Kraken, Uniswap, OKX, and Bitpanda to the most ambitious early-stage builders, use the OP stack to launch their own blockchains and bring their users onchain. Today, over 65% of Layer 2 activity on Ethereum runs through the OP stack.

We are a small team building at the speed of the ecosystem we support. We’re remote-friendly but the NYC office is our center of gravity. We've raised $178M from a16z, Paradigm, and others. We have our work cut out for us and are looking for exceptional people to join us.



What are the role responsibilities?

 - Partner Across the Organization
   
   - Work closely with Data and business teams to understand workflows, identify pain points, and find high-impact opportunities for AI-driven automation and efficiency.
   
   - Turn business problems into clear AI use cases.

 - Build & Prototype AI Solutions
   
   - Design and iterate on practical AI tools such as copilots, agents, and automated workflows using modern GenAI techniques. Write clean, reliable code in Python and Golang to support these solutions.

 - Scale to Production
   
   - Partner with engineering and data teams to turn prototypes into secure, scalable, production-ready systems.

 - Serve as an Internal AI Advisor
   
   - Guide teams on AI capabilities, responsible use, and best practices. Mentor others on design, coding standards, and effective AI tools.

 - Drive Adoption
   
   - Pilot new solutions with teams, gather feedback, iterate quickly, and support rollout to ensure real business impact.

 - Ensure Responsible AI
   
   - Work with Security, Legal, and Compliance to meet privacy, security, and ethical standards.

 - Measure Impact
   
   - Define success metrics and track outcomes such as:
     
     - Time saved
     
     - Cost reduction
     
     - Increased speed and productivity
     
     - Revenue impact
     
     - Risk reduction

 - Stay Current
   
   - Continuously explore new AI models, tools, and practices to bring practical innovations into the business.



What skills do you bring?

 - Experience
   
   - 4+ years in software engineering or a technical/analytical role
   
   - 1+ year working with applied AI, generative AI, or automation

 - AI & Automation Skills
   
   - Strong understanding of LLMs and common patterns (e.g., retrieval, agents)
   
   - Hands-on experience with AI tools and frameworks (e.g., Gemini, Claude, LangChain, Python)
   
   - Ability to quickly prototype working solutions

 - Software Engineering Strength
   
   - Experience building and scaling production systems
   
   - Strong system design, coding, and debugging skills

 - Business Mindset
   
   - Ability to understand business processes and turn them into technical solutions
   
   - Focus on measurable impact and ROI
   
   - Experience in fintech, crypto, or high-growth environments is a plus

 - Communication & Influence
   
   - Clear communicator with technical and non-technical audiences
   
   - Proven ability to drive adoption across teams

 - Problem Solving & Execution
   
   - Comfortable with ambiguity and fast iteration
   
   - Able to manage multiple projects in a dynamic environment

 - Collaboration & Risk Awareness
   
   - Experience working with engineering, legal, security, and compliance teams
   
   - Strong understanding of privacy and ethical considerations

 - Nice to Haves:
   
   - Background in BizOps, Data Science, Data Engineering, or Product Engineering
   
   - Experience building AI agents or advanced automation workflows



What will you like about us?

 - We take care of our employees. Competitive compensation, fully paid medical, dental, and vision, and a 4% 401K match.

 - We take pride in the accomplishments of our teammates and support each other in doing the best work of our ca

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Sales Lead
source_jobs.description:
OP Labs builds Optimism, an open-source blockchain network that powers the next generation of financial infrastructure. Hundreds of companies, from the world's largest enterprises like Sony, Coinbase, Kraken, Uniswap, OKX, and Bitpanda to the most ambitious early-stage builders, use the OP stack to launch their own blockchains and bring their users onchain. Today, over 65% of Layer 2 activity on Ethereum runs through the OP stack.

We are a small team building at the speed of the ecosystem we support. We’re remote-friendly but the NYC office is our center of gravity. We've raised $178M from a16z, Paradigm, and others. We have our work cut out for us and are looking for exceptional people to join us.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for an entrepreneurial, highly strategic Enterprise Sales Lead to drive adoption of Optimism across global institutions. You’ll be responsible for identifying, closing, and scaling high-impact partnerships with the largest institutions in the world which are strategic to our growth strategy.

This role is both strategic and executional. You’ll work directly with Optimism leadership, product, marketing, and partnership to shape new financial primitives that are only possible onchain. You will bring them to market through deep partnerships with the world’s most ambitious builders in institutions.



WHAT ARE THE ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES?

 - Own and execute strategy
   
   - Define and lead Optimism’s strategy for institutions end-to-end. Act like a GM
   
   - Identify high-leverage market entry points (e.g., stablecoin corridors, embedded finance use cases, B2B/B2C rails)
   
   - Translate protocol advantages into compelling narratives tailored to institutional decision-makers

 - Originate and close deals
   
   - Source, structure, and close high-impact partnerships with institutions

 - Drive product alignment
   
   - Collaborate closely with product, engineering, and partner teams to ensure successful integration and onboarding
   
   - Channel market feedback to influence roadmap decisions (e.g., compliance features, wallet UX, account abstraction)
   
   - Shape internal Optimism offerings (e.g., SDKs, liquidity support, ecosystem programs) to better meet institution partner needs

 - Lead externally
   
   - Represent Optimism at industry events, institutions conferences, and global policy forums
   
   - Publish thought leadership on programmable money, composable compliance, and the future of payments infrastructure
   
   - Build and maintain strong relationships with ecosystem players (wallets, stablecoin issuers, banking-as-a-service providers, L2s)



WHAT SKILLS DO YOU BRING?

 - Experience
   
   - 10+ years of experience in enterprise sales
   
   - Proven track record of closing and scaling complex deals with institutional clients
   
   - Deep understanding of fintech infrastructure: wallets, custody, card issuing, stablecoins, compliance tooling, and developer platforms
   
   - Familiarity with crypto infrastructure—especially Ethereum, Layer 2s, and wallet abstraction concepts

 - Skills & Approach
   
   - Sharp strategic thinker who can map fragmented fintech value chains and craft compelling BD theses
   
   - Independent deal-closer who’s comfortable interfacing with C-level stakeholders and navigating multi-party partnerships
   
   - High agency operator who can build 0→1 partnerships, GTM strategies, and partner programs with minimal oversight
   
   - Strong communicator who can translate between business, technical, and ecosystem stakeholders across varying levels of crypto fluency
   
   - Comfortable navigating ambiguity in a fast-moving, frontier market and iterating quickly based on learnings

 - Culture & Mindset
   
   - Motivated to rebuild the global financial stack on open, composable rails
   
   - You value results over recognition
   
   - Thrive in collaborative, cross-functional teams but can also move quickly on your own
   
   - Always looking to create s

notes: Blockchain-focused company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles
